learningOutcomes.outcome: Explain the basic architecture of transformer models
learningOutcomes.description: Describe the main components of a transformer (encoder, decoder, attention layers)

learningOutcomes.outcome: Describe how transformers process sequences of tokens
learningOutcomes.description: Explain the data flow from input tokens through the transformer to output predictions

learningOutcomes.outcome: Identify the role of embeddings in transformers
learningOutcomes.description: Explain how tokens are converted to embeddings and why this matters

learningOutcomes.outcome: Compare transformers to previous sequence models (RNNs, LSTMs)
learningOutcomes.description: Identify key advantages of transformers over recurrent architectures
